info.name: Tally Prime - Inventory API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Inventory/Stock data from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>StockItems</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="StockItemsList">
            <TYPE>Stock Item</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, BASEUNITS, COSTINGMETHOD, OPENINGBALANCE, OPENINGVALUE, CLOSINGBALANCE, CLOSINGVALUE</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all stock items with opening and closing balances

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Data</TYPE>
    <ID>StockSummary</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <REPORT NAME="StockSummary">
            <FORMS>StockSummary</FORMS>
          </REPORT>
          <FORM NAME="StockSummary">
            <PARTS>StockSummaryPart</PARTS>
          </FORM>
          <PART NAME="StockSummaryPart">
            <LINES>StockSummaryLine</LINES>
            <REPEAT>StockSummaryLine : StockItemCollection</REPEAT>
            <SCROLLED>Vertical</SCROLLED>
          </PART>
          <LINE NAME="StockSummaryLine">
            <FIELD>StockItemName, ClosingBalance, ClosingValue</FIELD>
          </LINE>
          <FIELD NAME="StockItemName">
            <SET>$Name</SET>
          </FIELD>
          <FIELD NAME="ClosingBalance">
            <SET>$ClosingBalance</SET>
          </FIELD>
          <FIELD NAME="ClosingValue">
            <SET>$ClosingValue</SET>
          </FIELD>
          <COLLECTION NAME="StockItemCollection">
            <TYPE>Stock Item</TYPE>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get stock summary with closing balances and values

item.name: Get Stock Item Details by Name

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export Data</TALLYREQUEST>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <EXPORTDATA>
      <REQUESTDESC>
        <REPORTNAME>List of Accounts</REPORTNAME>
        <STATICVARIABLES>
          <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
          <STOCKITEMNAME>Item Name Here</STOCKITEMNAME>
        </STATICVARIABLES>
      </REQUESTDESC>
    </EXPORTDATA>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get detailed information for a specific stock item

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>StockMovement</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="StockMovements">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, VOUCHERTYPENAME, PARTYLEDGERNAME</FETCH>
            <FETCH>ALLINVENTORYENTRIES.LIST : STOCKITEMNAME, ACTUALQTY, BILLEDQTY, RATE, AMOUNT</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get all stock movements (In/Out) for a date range

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>StockGroups</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="StockGroupsList">
            <TYPE>Stock Group</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, BASEUNITS</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>
